name: Coffman Park
description: Dublin’s Coffman eight (8) outdoor Pickleball courts are located at 6555 Commerce Parkway, next to the Dublin Police station and skateboard park. Lights are on from 5am until 11:00pm. There are heated restrooms, a water refill station, picnic tables, shelter house and wind screens.    If all courts are full, there is a 4 person paddle rack rotation, holding 32 paddles, to allow everyone a chance to play. Free to the public.

name: Muirfield Holbrook Pickleball Courts
description: They are private courts owned by the  Muirfield HOA Association.  Residents can reserve courts 2 weeks in advance.   The nets are on wheels for easy set-up. There are 4 tennis courts or 8 pickleball courts.  The lights stay on until 10:00pm.  There is a practice board on court 4S.  The courts are next to the pool.   There is plenty of free parking.   If open, the pool has a snack bar.  Restrooms and water is only closed durning the winter.
open_play_schedule: Courts can be reserved 2 weeks in advance for Muirfield residences.

name: Muirfield Park
description:
There are eight pickleball courts marked on four tennis courts.  The courts have wind screens and the pickleball nets are on wheels. Extra paddles are in the storage box. 

These courts are not public, they are owned by the Muirfield HOA.  Muirfield residents can reserve courts online. The courts are located by the pool.
open_play_schedule: The courts are maintained by the Muirfield Association. Members may invite guests.
